title: Signoff: Specialized packs + API + testing (03f, 03g, 04, 05)
description:
Run /plan-work-completion-signoff on these docs:
- docs/plans/03f-packs-personal-files.md → internal/packs/ (personal files rules)
- docs/plans/03g-packs-macos.md → internal/packs/ (macOS system rules)
- docs/plans/04-api-and-cli.md → guard/, cmd/dcg-go/
- docs/plans/04-api-and-cli-test-harness.md → guard/ tests, cmd/dcg-go/ tests, internal/testharness/ e2e
- docs/plans/05-testing-and-benchmarks.md → internal/testharness/
- docs/plans/05-testing-and-benchmarks-test-harness.md → internal/testharness/ tests

For each doc: read the plan thoroughly, compare every specified type/interface/function/algorithm against the actual code, run tests, then add a Completion Signoff section. Report gaps to dcg-scheduler.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed plan-work-completion-signoff pass. Docs updated with Completion Signoff sections and test verification. Commit: ca4cb85b110e29682600254b72fae3c36de13cf6. Reported gaps to scheduler (03f/03g pack implementations missing; 05 remains partial pending full pack set + upstream comparison evidence).
